scripts.build:css: sass static/scss:static/css --no-source-map --style=expanded && postcss static/css/*.css --use autoprefixer -d static/css/ --no-map
scripts.minify:css: cleancss -o static/css/site.min.css static/css/site.css && cleancss -o static/css/base.min.css static/css/base.css
scripts.build:prod: npm run build && npm run minify:css
